review: Love it.
Crashes on launch every time. Unusable.

Solid for quick notes but I wish sync was faster across devices. Sometimes edits from my phone take a few minutes to appear on my laptop and once I almost duplicated an entry because I thought it did not save.
Five stars. The widget alone is worth installing.
Okay app. Nothing special but it works.
Battery drain is real. Deleted after two days.
UI is clean. Took me a minute to find settings.
Notifications are way too aggressive even on low.
Great for tracking habits if you keep it simple.
Search is slow when you have a lot saved items.
Please add dark mode. My eyes beg you.
Customer support replied in hours. Impressed.
Maps load wrong sometimes after the last update.
Simple and reliable. Exactly what I needed.
Too many paywalls for basic features.
The onboarding is long but helpful.
Keeps logging me out. Fix this.
Offline mode works better than I expected.
Cute design but missing export options.
Fast. Rarely see loading spinners.

I use it daily for grocery lists and it never fails me. I share the list with my partner, we both add items throughout the week, and checkout at the store is smoother because everything is categorized. My only nitpick is that reordering sections could be easier.
Audio skips on Bluetooth in my car. Frustrating.
Privacy policy is clearer than most competitors.
Widgets broke after iOS update. Waiting on a patch.
Good concept but the community is pretty quiet.
Reminders fire on time. That is all I wanted.
The free tier is generous compared to similar apps.
Confusing navigation between tabs.
Love the weekly recap email. Short and useful.
Crashes when I attach large photos.
Works great on my tablet. Phone layout feels cramped.
Signing in with SSO was smooth.

I would pay for a one-time purchase but subscriptions add up across apps. If there was a lifetime unlock for basic features I would buy it immediately. Until then I am staying on the free tier and tolerating the ads.
Helpful tutorials but they repeat the same tips.
Export to PDF would make this perfect for work.
Randomly resets my preferences. Happened twice.
Clean charts. I finally understand my spending.
Needs better filters. I scroll forever.
The team ships updates often which I appreciate.
Slow on older phones. Fair warning.
Love the calm color palette. Feels intentional.
Spammy upsells after every action. No thanks.
Reliable scanner. Text recognition is accurate enough.
Wish there was a web version for my laptop.

Good for beginners and the templates help you start fast. Power users may feel limited because automation and integrations are shallow compared with desktop tools. For my workflow I still export notes once a week and finish formatting elsewhere.
Location permission feels broader than necessary.
The sound effects can be turned off. Thank goodness.
Sync conflicts when editing on two devices.
Overall stable. Minor bugs but nothing deal-breaking.
This replaced three other apps for me.
